title: Promoting critical health literacy through microlearning in secondary schools: Study protocol for a feasibility study using the example of interpreting risk reductions in mathematics education
author: Zacher, Sandro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This working paper contains the study protocol for the feasibility study "Promoting critical health literacy through microlearning in secondary schools: A feasibility study using the example of interpreting risk reductions in mathematics education." The protocol describes the objectives, methodology and organisational procedures of the study.
steps_raw: This working paper contains the study protocol for the feasibility study "Promoting critical health literacy through microlearning in secondary schools: A feasibility study using the example of interpreting risk reductions in mathematics education." The protocol describes the objectives, methodology and organisational procedures of the study.
